message:
fix: gt mayor at aborts on dolt startup failure (#2246)

Make ensureMayorInfra return an error so runMayorAttach fails fast when
Dolt cannot start (e.g. port conflict from another town). Enriches the
error with the PID holding the port, the data-dir it serves, and a
concrete gt config set dolt.port command with the next free port.

Adds dolt.port to gt config set/get, writing GT_DOLT_PORT to
mayor/daemon.json env section for multi-town setups.

Co-Authored-By: Pierre-Alexandre Entraygues <paentraygues@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
